Product Tabs

Description

How to

Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined is a unique, SiO₂-based spray formulated to extend and enhance the self-cleaning properties of any Paint Protection Film (PPF) on the market. It is the ideal maintenance solution for films coated with Q² PPF EVO or any other PPF system.

## Product Features and Benefits

- 
**Slick & Repellent Finish:** Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined preserves the incredible slickness of your PPF or vinyl wrap. Its SiO₂ content increases the hydrophobicity of the film, providing added protection against UV rays and oxidation, all while enhancing the original self-cleaning capabilities.

- 
**REDEFINED:** As part of GYEON’s REDEFINED line, this product offers superior performance, durability, and ease of use, taking PPF maintenance to the next level.

Q²M PPF Maintain will allow you to maintain incredible slickness of your PPF or Vinyl wrap. Being SiO² based, it will also increase the original hydrophobicity of your film while adding more protection against UV rays & future oxidation.

Gyeon Q²M PPF Maintain contains no harsh chemicals or solvents, making it safe for use on all types of paint protection films. This product is easy to use and can be applied by hand or with a foam applicator. Simply apply a small amount of product to the surface of the film, and then wipe it clean with a microfiber towel.

Gyeon Q²M PPF Maintain is an essential product for anyone who has invested in a paint protection film for their vehicle. With regular use, this product will help to maintain the appearance and longevity of your film, ensuring that it continues to provide the protection that you need.

**SUITABLE FOR MATTE PPF: **YES
**Consumption****:** 30ml/ car
**Durability****:** >6 weeks

### Step 1: Prepare the Surface

Before using Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain, make sure the surface is cool to the touch and out of direct sunlight. Rinse the surface with water to remove any loose dirt or debris.

### Step 2: Shake the Bottle

Shake the bottle well before use to ensure the product is properly mixed.

### Step 3: Spray the Product onto the Surface

Spray Gyeon Q2M PPF Maintain onto the surface, making sure to cover the entire area. Do not let the product dry on the surface.

### Step 4: Level Down Towel

Using a microfiber towel, gently wipe off the product, leveling down any high spots. Make sure to use a clean section of the towel for each pass.

### Step 5: Wipe Away Excess Product

After wiping off the excess product with a clean microfiber towel.
